variants.title: Fleetguard AF55863 Air Filter - Panel | Replaces the Donaldson P780164
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF55863 Air Filter - Panel | Replaces the Donaldson P780164
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF55863 panel cabin air filter provides clean air in the cab which means a clean work environment.  Breathing cleaner air can lead to longer and more productive working hours.
specifications: Style: Air Filter, Primary Special, Efficiency 1: ISO 5011, Length: 229.1 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: ISO 5011

variants.title: Donaldson P780164 Air Filter, Primary Special
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P780164 Air Filter, Primary Special
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P780164 Air Filter, Primary Special is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Air Filter, Primary Special, Efficiency 1: ISO 5011, Length: 229.1 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: ISO 5011
